name_en: Mini 👄L New Geometric Bag, lightweight, versatile styling. The new solid Puzzle Lo Pink is a must-have! The highlight is this season's satin calfskin, which is smoother, glossier, and holds its shape better. The strap, metal buckle, and lining are all color-coordinated, offering a novel yet high-end look. The wide strap design is a pleasant surprise, and the back zip pocket has been replaced by a small pocket. The new ceiling item! Just buy it. Model: L10173B, Size: 18*7.5*12cm
